name: GoZoek increased their clients’ direction requests by 154% with Synup
client_challenge:
When Zoek first started offering off-site SEO services to their clients in the form of directory listings, they chose Yext. As time went on, they realized that Yext’s operation was too large to provide care and quality services to their company and clients. After several issues that took months to resolve, Zoek decided to switch services once and for all.

‍

With so many alternatives and a bad experience they were ready to put behind them, the Zoek team started their diligent search for a new local marketing platform. In their search for a listings management platform, Zoek wasn’t seeking bells and whistles; they needed a killer platform supported by a team that they could trust.
highlight:
“Synup stood out from the rest with their support team,” said Kristen Dillon, VP of Operations at Zoek. “Pretty much everyone in the company has been involved with Zoek from day one and has always been readily available to assist with anything and everything.”

‍
client_solution:
For agency partners like GoZoek, Synup doesn’t just impact their bottom line; the success of the platform impacts their clients’ bottom lines, too. With so many accounts, they needed reliable software that they could rely upon.

‍

“They really go above and beyond and take the time to learn from us how they can continue to develop their services to fit our clients’ needs,” Dillon gushed.

‍

With help from the Synup team, Zoek can support their clients in managing their online presence with listings, reviews, social media, and beyond. All of Zoek’s clients get access to Synup’s white-labeled dashboard, and the Synup team consistently helps field questions and assists in walkthroughs for clients - as well as supporting the Zoek team with helpful collateral and keeping them abreast of any updates or new features.
the_difference:
Powered by Synup, GoZoek gets incredible success for their clients. 

‍

Across their clients:

‍

  • Profile views for customers have increased 62%
  • Website visits up 25%
  • Phone calls up 55%
  • Direction requests up 154%

‍

The power of the Synup platform is not just in the results; it’s in the agency that’s afforded any and all users of the platform. Zoek’s clients have access to a dashboard that gives them complete control over their Google Business Profiles, enabling them to monitor and generate reviews, manage social posts, and ensure accurate data across the board.

seo.title: GoZoek increased their clients’ direction requests by 154% with Synup
